cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out the answer to the question: "The dance project aims to ___." The options are A, B, C, D. Let me read through the passage again to make sure I get the details right. The passage is about LaMar Baylor and Rebecca Davis teaching dance to street children in Rwanda. The project is by the Rebecca Davis Dance Company. The article mentions that the children have lost their families, some have been in prison or sold their bodies for sex. The dance classes give them structured learning and self-expression they haven't had before. Rebecca Davis believes learning to dance is a step toward education.
